## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -s build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -s test:all` passes (added/updated tests where relevant)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] Follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No `dist/` artifacts committed
